opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Caracas, October 4, 1892. (Received October 5.)

div.p: Mr. Scruggs reports that the blockade of Puerto Cabello is effected by two inefficient Venezuelan steamers which are present there at intervals, and now threaten to fire upon New York American steamers. He asks whether the naval forces of the United States should respect such a blockade, should the steamers make an attempt to enter.
